text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It was definitely the right call to adjust the data
reference. Accuracy's way up.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it went just as calculated. This goes a ways
to prove that I'm right—but it's still not quite
enough.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I need to produce even more overwhelming
results and make everyone who's been spouting
garbage eat their words.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Wow, thanks for the pearl of wisdom.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've acquired some new data. I'm not about to
waste a chance to improve my accuracy.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty interested to see what kind of results I
can put out next time.
